sap_dev_mode.description: Preferred SAP login/automation mode. Controls which skill variant is selected first when multiple implementations exist for the same task. Allowed values: 'GUI' (SAP GUI Scripting), 'RFC' (SAP.Functions COM via RFC), 'BDC' (BDC recordings replayed via SHDB). Default: 'GUI'. Fallback chains: GUI -> RFC -> BDC, RFC -> BDC -> GUI, BDC -> RFC -> GUI.

sap_dev_transport_request.description: Default SAP transport request number for development work (e.g. 'DEVK900001'). Behaviour depends on way_to_get_transport_request. If blank, use skill sap-transport-request (or sap-se01) to create a new transport request.

way_to_get_transport_request.description: How skills obtain a transport request when one is needed. Allowed values: 'DEFAULT' (always reuse sap_dev_transport_request; ask only if blank), 'ASK' (ask each time and offer to save as default), 'CREATE_NEW' (always create a new TR via sap-se01 without asking). Default: 'DEFAULT'.

rule_of_tr_description.description: How TR short descriptions are generated when a new TR is created. Allowed values: 'ASK' (prompt user each time), 'PATTERN' (render tr_description_template with placeholders), 'FIXED' (use tr_description_template literally), 'RANDOM' (generate a random 60-char string). Default: 'ASK'.

tr_description_template.description: Template used by rule_of_tr_description. For PATTERN: a string with placeholders {YYYYMMDD} {HHMMSS} {USER} {OBJECT_TYPE} {OBJECT_DESCRIPTION} {RANDOM4} (e.g. '{YYYYMMDD}_{OBJECT_TYPE}_{OBJECT_DESCRIPTION}'). For FIXED: the literal description text. Ignored when rule_of_tr_description is ASK or RANDOM. Final result is truncated to 60 chars.

sap_dev_package.description: SAP development package for development work (e.g. 'ZDEV_PACKAGE'). If blank, use skill sap-se21 to create a new package.

sap_dev_function_group.description: SAP development function module group for development work (e.g. 'ZDEV_FM_GROUP'). If blank, use skill sap-se21 to create a new function module group.

sap_logon_description.description: SAP Logon pad entry name (e.g. 'DEV_100'). If blank, uses connection string instead.

sap_application_server.description: SAP application server hostname or IP (e.g. '10.0.0.1')

work_dir.description: Working directory for all SAP dev operations. Subdirectories (temp, custom, design_docs, source_code) are auto-created when skills run. Default: C:\sap_dev_work

custom_url.description: Custom overrides directory. Place custom abap_naming_rules.tsv here to override defaults. If blank, uses {work_dir}\custom.

design_docs_url.description: Design documentation directory. If blank, uses {work_dir}\design_docs.

source_code_url.description: Source code repository directory. If blank, uses {work_dir}\source_code.

template_language.description: Preferred language for customer-facing templates (customer_brief.md, spec_template.xlsx, etc.). Allowed values: 'EN', 'JA', 'ZH'. If blank, falls back to sap_language. If sap_language is also blank, defaults to 'EN'. Resolution chain: see CLAUDE.md 'Template Language Resolution'.

fm_cache_enabled.description: Cache FM signatures from RPY_FUNCTIONMODULE_READ_NEW. When true, sap-gen-abap pre-fetches FMs mentioned in the spec and reuses cached signatures across runs. Allowed values: 'true' / 'false'. Default: 'true'.

fm_cache_dir.description: FM signature cache directory. If blank, uses {work_dir}\cache\fm_signatures. Cache is partitioned per SAP system as <CACHE_DIR>\<server>_<sysnr>_<client>\<FM_NAME>.tsv.

fm_cache_ttl_std_days.description: TTL (in days) for SAP standard FM signature cache (BAPI_*, RFC_*, etc.). Stable across patches; long TTL is fine. Default: '30'.

fm_cache_ttl_z_days.description: TTL (in days) for Z*/Y* FM signature cache (customer namespace). Customer FMs change during development; short TTL avoids stale signatures. Default: '1'.

log_enabled.description: Master switch for skill logging. Allowed values: 'true' / 'false'. Default: 'true'.

log_level.description: Minimum level recorded. Allowed values: 'DEBUG', 'INFO', 'WARN', 'ERROR', 'OFF'. Default: 'INFO'.

log_dir.description: Directory for log files. If blank, uses {work_dir}\logs.

log_file_pattern.description: Log filename template. Placeholders: {YYYYMMDD} {YYYYMM} {HHMMSS} {HHMM} {RUN_ID} {SKILL} {USER} {SYSTEM}. Default: 'sap-dev-{YYYYMMDD}.log' (one file per day, all runs merged). For per-run files: 'sap-dev-{YYYYMMDD}-{HHMMSS}-{SKILL}.log' or 'sap-dev-{YYYYMMDD}-{RUN_ID}.log'.

log_retention_days.description: Delete log files older than N days. 0 = keep forever. Default: 30.

log_format.description: Log record format on disk. Allowed values: 'JSONL' (one JSON object per line, default), 'TSV' (tab-separated, fixed columns), 'TEXT' (human-readable single line).

log_console_echo.description: Mirror each record to stdout/stderr in addition to writing the file. Allowed values: 'true' / 'false'. Default: 'false'.

log_max_size_mb.description: Rotate the active log file when it reaches N megabytes. Rotated files become {name}.1, {name}.2, ... up to log_max_backups. 0 = no size-based rotation. Default: 10.

log_max_backups.description: Number of rotated backups to keep when log_max_size_mb triggers. Default: 5.

log_redact_keys.description: Comma-separated list of param/extra keys whose values are masked as '***' in log records. Defaults to 'sap_password,password,passwd,pwd,token,secret,api_key'.

sap_gui_security_warmup_done.description: Set to true after sap-dev-init Step 1b successfully persists SAP GUI Security trust for {work_dir}. Subsequent runs skip the warmup when true.
